caption:
My 11 PM closed-door seminar was supposed to be a lecture on ethics, but the velvet curtains and low lighting made the room feel entirely different. I adjusted my tailored blazer, feeling the fabric hug my curves perfectly. A student leaned in too close, and I smiled, knowing the night was just beginning. 📚🔥
#UniversityTeacher #LateNightStudy #Curves #AcademicLife #HotProf
